name: milpa/skeleton
description: The composer create-project starting point for a Milpa app: boots milpa/runtime's Kernel, serves a real HTTP response with zero database, and ships a coa CLI (doctor/validate/make/inspect, plus every plugin-declared CommandProviderInterface command) wired to milpa/devtools. Minimal by default — the agent-ready surface (MCP/tools, bin/mcp-server.php) is opt-in via `composer require milpa/tool-runtime milpa/mcp-server` or `php bin/coa agent:enable`.

suggest.milpa/tool-runtime: Install to expose this app's tools over MCP — the agent-ready surface. `composer require milpa/tool-runtime milpa/mcp-server` (or: `php bin/coa agent:enable`).
suggest.milpa/mcp-server: Install to expose this app's tools over MCP — the agent-ready surface. `composer require milpa/tool-runtime milpa/mcp-server` (or: `php bin/coa agent:enable`).
